_comment: Ratchet floors for scripts/check-observability-ratchet.mjs. Set to actual counts as of 2026-07-12 (frontendMetricsCallSites/rustMetricsCallSites added when Sentry Application Metrics were wired in; other floors set 2026-07-10). When a PR adds e2e specs or Sentry/tracing/metrics instrumentation, raise the relevant floor(s) here in the same PR. Never lower a floor to make CI pass — that defeats the point; if the count is wrong, fix the script instead.
